Visa Sponsorship: H-1B Specialty Occupation

A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.reason: The only VISITING_STUDENT_PAGE captured (src_40) is for AdventHealth Redmond (GA), not AdventHealth Orlando (FL). No Orlando-specific visiting student / observership / clerkship page was located, and no explicit negative quote was captured for the Orlando campus.
A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow search for an Orlando-specific clerkship / visiting student / observership URL on adventhealth.com path containing 'orlando' or via the Orlando GME directory; capture either a positive Orlando-scoped offer or an explicit Orlando refusal.

A4TargetedRecoveryTasks.reason: No dedicated observership page captured for AdventHealth Orlando. Search yielded GME, careers, volunteer, and a Redmond clerkship, but no Orlando observership signal (positive or negative).
